title: phyllanthus oxycoccifolius
intro: Phyllanthus oxycoccifolius, also known as Caricaboa or Jamaica quinine tree, is a plant species found in tropical regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimalarial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Phyllanthus oxycoccifolius include the treatment of fever, headache, and malaria, as well as its use as a diuretic and to aid in the management of diabetes. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus oxycoccifolius include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
